subcodes.title: Prayer for Haji Mirza Jani Kashani
subcodes.first_line: How can I call on Thee, O my God, after I have rebelled against Thee, neglected the Repositories of Thy decree, and turned away from the Seats of Thy communion?
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. یا الهی کیف ادعوک بعد عصیانی نفسک و اغفالی عن مواقع حکمک و ادباری عن مقاعد مناجاتک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
